archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) crossed with Archetype 5 (Luxury/Editorial) for cultural depth and dignity

core_principles: Trauma-Informed Design: Dignified treatment of victims, no sensationalism, respectful spacing.
Archival Index Aesthetic: Clean grids, clear labeling, high-end editorial feel.
Tokenized Theming: Fully CSS variable-driven for easy owner recoloring.
Solutions Journalism Focus: Empowering, clear, high-contrast readability.

color_system.strategy: Pan-African inspired but highly muted and professional. Deep, grounded, and dignified. CSS variables must be implemented in index.css.
color_system.description: Background is an off-white linen to reduce reading fatigue. Primary is a rich classic black for authority. Accent is a dignified crimson (not blinding red) for alerts, breaking news, and cold case tags.

typography.strategy: High-end editorial. Oversized, high-contrast serif for headings to give magazine-like gravitas. Clean geometric sans for UI/Body to maintain Swiss-level clarity.

layout_spacing.strategy: Generous spacing. Bento Grids for homepage features, Swiss grid (strict alignment) for article layouts.

grid_system.homepage: Bento style. 12-column grid. Asymmetrical feature blocks.
grid_system.cold_case: Archival Index style. Strict rows with 1px bottom borders (border-border), clear metadata columns.

buttons.primary: Solid dark background (--primary), white text, rounded-none, hover:bg-black/80 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: Border 1px solid --border, transparent background, text --foreground, hover:bg-muted

cards.news_article: No physical borders. Large image, tightly tracked headline underneath, overline category tag.
cards.cold_case: Flat, muted background (--muted), no shadow, 1px border. Extremely respectful, no 'true crime' aesthetic. Focus on data clarity.

navigation.header: Sticky, glassmorphism but minimal blur (bg-background/90 backdrop-blur-md), bottom border 1px solid --border. Includes Breaking News ticker (slow marquee).

media.image_treatment: High contrast, slight desaturation on news images for editorial consistency. No heavy gradient overlays, use gradient-to-t black/40 to transparent only where text contrast is strictly needed.

hero_solutions.description: Five people sitting at table and talking - perfect for Solutions Journalism/Co-op representation.

cold_case_bg.description: Respectful city street. Use as muted background for Cold Case map/header section.

coop_meeting.description: Black professionals meeting. Use for Digital News Co-op/Membership page.

motion_interactions.strategy: Intentional, subtle motion. No bouncy animations.
motion_interactions.hover_states: Text color shifts slightly, images scale 1.02x slowly over 0.6s.
motion_interactions.page_load: Fade in with slight upward translation.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: You must install lucide-react for icons, framer-motion for subtle animations, and react-fast-marquee for the breaking news ticker.

STYLING: Implement the provided CSS variable tokens in the global index.css. Do not hardcode hex values in Tailwind classes; use the Tailwind semantic equivalents (e.g., bg-background, text-primary, text-accent).
TYPOGRAPHY: Add 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Satoshi' to the project via Google Fonts/Fontsource and update tailwind.config.js.
TESTING: Every interactive element MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='submit-tip-button').
TONE: Ensure the Cold Case section feels like a dignified public record, not a sensational true crime blog. Flat surfaces, clear typography, no drop shadows.
